steps:
1.Launch the application.

2.Wait for the splash screen to complete.

3.Swipe to continue and complete all onboarding steps (ON_01B through ON_01D).

4.Reach the ON_01E onboarding screen.

5.Locate and verify the "Start" button.

6.Tap the "Get Started!" button.

7.On the home screen, connect the printer, select an image from the gallery, and reach the Print Preview screen.
Perform pre-conditions. 
8. Simulate "Out of Paper" error. 
9. Tap "Print".
cases.expected: An "Out of Paper" error pop-up appears over the dimmed Print Preview screen. The pop-up contains the header "Out of Paper", the message "Please load paper and try printing again.", a "TIP" about the colored card, an "OK" button, and a Close (X) icon in the top-right corner. The print job does not proceed until paper is loaded and the error is resolved.

verifications.expected: An "Out of Paper" error pop-up appears over the dimmed Print Preview screen. The pop-up contains the header "Out of Paper", the message "Please load paper and try printing again.", a "TIP" about the colored card, an "OK" button, and a Close (X) icon in the top-right corner. The print job does not proceed until paper is loaded and the error is resolved.

The popup includes an "OK" button at the bottom and a Close (X) icon in the top-right corner. The print job is paused until the printer reaches its normal operating temperature.
